---
name: beads
description: Use when managing work with the bd CLI, especially "create task", "what's ready", "track this work", dependencies, blockers, multi-session work, or recovery after compaction.
---

# Beads

Use `bd` through the shell for issue tracking. Run `bd prime` for the current project workflow and `bd <command> --help` for current command syntax.

Keep issue state in Beads rather than parallel TODO files. Claim work before implementation, validate before closing it, and record discovered follow-up with its dependency relationship.
